text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I wonder if my nose has stopped bleeding...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Why am I always smacking into walls like
that?
...annhaus... you hear...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?

Matikanetannhauser... Can you hear me? I'm
speaking directly... into your mind...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uwaaah! Wh-wh-what's going on?! Who are you?!
Tis I, the god of nosebleeds.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: The god of nosebleeds?!

text_block_list.name: God of Nosebleeds
text_block_list.text:
Your nosebleeds have shed enough blood to fill
an entire bucket, and so I have been summoned.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That much?! I guess I do run into things a lot...

text_block_list.name: God of Nosebleeds
text_block_list.text: Congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Is that really something to be happy about?

text_block_list.name: God of Nosebleeds
text_block_list.text:
Of course it is. Your nosebleeds are proof that
you continue to run at full tilt, with no fear of
crashing into things.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I see! When you put it like that, nosebleeds
don't seem so bad!

text_block_list.name: God of Nosebleeds
text_block_list.text:
Please continue to run at top speed. I'll be
cheering for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll do my best! Ei, ei, mun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Did I fall asleep?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it was just a dream. Figures. A god of
nosebleeds—how silly.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But... if nosebleeds are proof that I'm always
running my hardest...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I guess it wasn't such a bad dream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day forward, Matikanetannhauser's
running becomes even more refined.
